'''Mutriok''' were four-legged [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creatures native to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. They were often preyed on by [[tra'cor]]s, the amphibious cousins of the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
